name: SubTel Forum
notes: Primary source for subsea cable news. Covers repair ships, fault reports, maintenance windows.

name: ThousandEyes Internet Outages
notes: Monitors ISP and network outages globally. Good for detecting route degradation.

name: X / Twitter Search
query: "subsea cable" (cut OR fault OR outage OR repair OR severed) -is:retweet lang:en
notes: Real-time social signal. Filter noise with min_retweets. Watch for ship crew posts, NOC engineers.

name: Kentik Network Outage Map
notes: Activate when Kentik page structure is confirmed. Slower cadence due to page complexity.

name: RIPE NCC BGP Anomalies
notes: BGP routing changes can indicate cable failures. Needs API key and prefix-specific queries. Phase 2.
